title: Construction Stock Faces Multiple Headwinds

title: D.R. Horton: Short-Term Pain, Long-Term Gain
text: D.R. Horton has grown tremendously coming out of the Great Recession by focusing on the top 50 cities in the US. But the short-term outlook isn't as bright. The industry is currently faced with macro headwinds of high inflation, high home prices, and a looming recession.

title: D.R. Horton: Well Equipped Market Leader, Positioned To Overcome Macroeconomic Pressures
